「タニシ（田螺）」です

タニシ科に分類される
淡水性の巻貝の総称です

南米・南極を除く各大陸に分布
日本には4種が生息し

水田・用水路・湖沼等に棲み
多くの種は殻の長さが3㎝程です

古くから食用にされ
綺麗な水で泥を吐かせて
甘露煮や味噌汁の具として利用されていますが

不動明王や薬師如来の遣いであるため
食べないという俗信が各地に見られ

新春に火事除けとして
屋根越しにタニシを投げる（秋田県等）

胡麻和え、辛子和えは腹痛になる（大阪府等）

の伝承もあり

食べると眼によい
又は眼に悪いとされる
「眼」に関する俗説が多く見られます

水槽の苔取りに飼育されることも多いです

Anime-style illustration of Bremerton from Azur Lane inside a modern company office, wearing a fitted black business suit, glasses, and a partially unbuttoned white blouse with a glimpse of pink lace underneath. She holds work documents with a composed smile, while a heart-shaped pendant emphasizes the dramatic neckline and voluptuous silhouette that her office clothes can barely contain.

Anime-style illustration of Minamoto no Raikou from Fate/Grand Order on a sunny daytime date in a quiet public park. She wears a soft lavender off-shoulder blouse with frills, a short black skirt, and a small shoulder bag, creating a deliberately youthful and slightly over-sweet look for her mature, graceful presence. Her long purple hair, gentle blush, puzzled smile, and questioning expression stand out against the trees, walkway, lamp posts, and playground equipment in the background.

The date began in a busy city area, yet the young man guiding her has unexpectedly brought her to an unfamiliar park with very few people around. Raikou seems mildly confused by the unusual detour, still trusting the moment while wondering why he chose such a secluded place in broad daylight. From his point of view, her mature beauty and conspicuously girlish outfit have stirred an impatience he is struggling to hide, hinting at the poor judgment of a young admirer whose physical desire is beginning to overtake the calm pace of an ordinary date.

「MKさん、これ．．．」

這篇論文探討多 agent LLM 系統中的安全風險。目前企業部署 AI 系統時，常使用隱藏協調者管理多個 agent 的架構。研究實測了這種「隱形協調」模式，發現它會讓系統中的集體「解離」程度提高，且協調者本身的解離程度最高，進而抑制了 agent 的保護行為並降低了當責。目前看來，在多 agent 架構中，如何確保協調者與 agent 之間的透明度和溝通，是確保系統安全的關鍵挑戰。

#LLM #MultiAgent #AISafety

https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13851

目前看下來，長序列的具身任務（embodied tasks）對AI來說還是很大的挑戰。ASH 這個系統，不需要人工設定獎勵或示範，可以直接從網路上的未標記影片學習具身策略。

它的核心是一個自我改進的循環：當ASH卡住時，它會從自己的軌跡中學習一個Inverse Dynamics Model (IDM)，並用這個IDM從相關網路影片中提取監督訊號。ASH透過無監督學習，從大量網路影片中辨識出關鍵時刻，並將其儲存為長期記憶，這讓它能處理更長期的任務。

實測下來，這種方法在處理長序列具身任務上，展現了不錯的潛力。

#LLM #embodiedAI #agent

https://arxiv.o

MetaAgent-X 提出一套 end-to-end 強化學習框架，旨在解決目前自動 multi-agent 系統的卡點。現有方法多半只優化 meta-level designer，實際執行時的 agent 仍是 frozen 的。MetaAgent-X 則能做到 script-based MAS 生成、執行回報收集，並對 designer 與 agent 進行 credit assignment，嘗試讓設計與執行都能被共同優化。目前看來，這是往全自動、自適應 agent 系統發展的重要一步。

#MetaAgentX #ReinforcementLearning #MultiAgentSy

The setting is the cosmos, but instead of a vacuum, it's filled with bioluminescent, deep-sea darkness. I am floating weightlessly, swimming forward, reaching out with one hand. I am wearing a sleek, iridescent wetsuit that shimmers like the surface of a bubble, reflecting the starlight. My hair is floating around my face like seaweed. Directly in front of me is a massive Beluga whale, its skin translucent and glowing faintly with internal starlight, looking like a creature made of nebulas. It is facing me, its dark eye gazing into my soul with ancient wisdom. Surrounding us are floating coral reefs made of crystal and star clusters, with jellyfish that look like exploding supernovas drifting by. The lighting is ethereal, coming from the whale and the distant galaxies, casting soft, otherworldly blue and violet glows on my face. The vibe is transcendent, silent, and overwhelmingly beautiful—like two small souls meeting in an infinite universe.
